title: Accelerating the cyber defense ecosystem that protects us all
summary: Leading security firms and enterprises join OpenAI’s Trusted Access for Cyber, using GPT-5.4-Cyber and $10M in API grants to strengthen global cyber defense.
title_es: OpenAI lanza GPT-5.4-Cyber y programa de defensa cibernética
bajada: OpenAI presentó GPT-5.4-Cyber, un modelo especializado en ciberseguridad, junto con $10M en grants de API para empresas y firmas de seguridad. La iniciativa busca fortalecer la defensa cibernética global a través de su programa Trusted Access for Cyber.
bajada_en: OpenAI unveiled GPT-5.4-Cyber, a specialized model for cybersecurity, alongside $10M in API grants for enterprises and security firms. The initiative aims to strengthen global cyber defense through its Trusted Access for Cyber program.

title: Canva’s AI 2.0 update goes all in on prompt-powered design tools
summary: Canva has overhauled its design and workspace suite as it attempts to become the ultimate centralized hub for AI-powered content creation. The platform announced its Canva AI 2.0 update today, introducing updated tools and new prompt-based editing capabilities that allow users to make or adjust their work by describing what they want to create to […]
title_es: Canva AI 2.0: rediseño completo enfocado en edición por prompts
bajada: Canva lanzó su actualización AI 2.0 con nuevas herramientas y capacidades de edición basadas en prompts. La plataforma se posiciona como hub centralizado para creación de contenido potenciada por IA.
bajada_en: Canva launched its AI 2.0 update with new tools and prompt-based editing capabilities. The platform positions itself as a centralized hub for AI-powered content creation.

title: Adobe embraces conversational AI editing, marking a ‘fundamental shift’ in creative work
summary: Adobe is fully embracing AI tools that enable creators to edit their work using descriptive prompts, instead of manually using specific Creative Cloud apps. The software giant's new Firefly AI Assistant allows users to describe what they want to change by typing their own words into a conversational interface. Adobe says this marks a "fundamental […]
title_es: Adobe introduce edición conversacional con Firefly AI Assistant
bajada: Adobe presentó su nuevo Firefly AI Assistant que permite a creadores editar contenido usando descripciones conversacionales en lugar de herramientas manuales. La compañía lo describe como un cambio fundamental en cómo se trabaja en Creative Cloud.
bajada_en: Adobe unveiled its new Firefly AI Assistant enabling creators to edit content using conversational descriptions instead of manual tools. The company describes it as a fundamental shift in how Creative Cloud is used.

title: The next evolution of the Agents SDK
summary: OpenAI updates the Agents SDK with native sandbox execution and a model-native harness, helping developers build secure, long-running agents across files and tools.
title_es: OpenAI mejora Agents SDK con ejecución en sandbox nativa
bajada: OpenAI actualizó su SDK de agentes con ejecución de código segura en sandbox y un harness nativo del modelo. Los desarrolladores ahora pueden construir agentes de larga duración más seguros que interactúen con archivos y herramientas externas.
bajada_en: OpenAI upgraded its Agents SDK with native sandbox execution and model-native harness for secure code execution. Developers can now build safer, long-running agents that interact with files and external tools.

title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
summary: Gemini logo next to the text "3.1 Flash TTS", all over colored dots
title_es: Google presenta Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS con síntesis de voz expresiva
bajada: Google lanzó Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS, la próxima generación de síntesis de voz con capacidades más expresivas y naturales. Esta herramienta amplía las capacidades multimodales de Gemini para aplicaciones de voz.
bajada_en: Google launched Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS, the next generation of text-to-speech with more expressive and natural voice capabilities. This tool expands Gemini's multimodal capabilities for voice applications.

title: Canva’s AI assistant can now call various tools to make designs for you
summary: The latest version of Canva's AI assistant lets users create editable designs with text prompts.
title_es: Canva integra herramientas de IA para diseño con prompts
bajada: Canva mejoró su asistente de IA para permitir a usuarios crear diseños editables directamente desde descripciones en lenguaje natural. La herramienta puede ahora invocar múltiples funciones para automatizar tareas de diseño complejas.
bajada_en: Canva enhanced its AI assistant to let users create editable designs directly from natural language descriptions. The tool can now invoke multiple functions to automate complex design tasks.

title: DeepL, known for text translation, now wants to translate your voice
summary: DeepL says its tech could be used for real-time translation with meeting tools like Zoom and Microsoft Teams
title_es: DeepL expande su plataforma hacia traducción de voz en tiempo real
bajada: DeepL, conocida por su servicio de traducción de textos, anunció capacidades de traducción de voz para herramientas como Zoom y Microsoft Teams. La solución permitiría traducción en tiempo real en reuniones profesionales.
bajada_en: DeepL, known for text translation, announced voice translation capabilities for tools like Zoom and Microsoft Teams. The solution would enable real-time translation in professional meetings.

title: Treating enterprise AI as an operating layer
summary: There’s a fault line running through enterprise AI, and it’s not the one getting the most attention. The public conversation still tracks foundation models and benchmarks — GPT versus Gemini, reasoning scores, and marginal capability gains. But in practice, the more durable advantage is structural: who owns the operating layer where intelligence is applied, governed,…
title_es: La ventaja estructural en IA empresarial está en la capa operativa
bajada: MIT Tech Review advierte que la verdadera brecha competitiva en IA empresarial no está en modelos, sino en quién controla la capa operativa donde se aplica y gobierna la inteligencia. Esto es más importante que incrementos marginales de capacidad.
bajada_en: MIT Tech Review argues the real competitive gap in enterprise AI isn't in models, but in who controls the operating layer where intelligence is applied and governed. This matters more than marginal capability gains.

title: Why having “humans in the loop” in an AI war is an illusion
summary: The availability of artificial intelligence for use in warfare is at the center of a legal battle between Anthropic and the Pentagon. This debate has become urgent, with AI playing a bigger role than ever before in the current conflict with Iran. AI is no longer just helping humans analyze intelligence. It is now an…
title_es: La ilusión del control humano en guerras potenciadas por IA
bajada: MIT Tech Review analiza por qué el concepto de "humans in the loop" en conflictos con IA es una ilusión, en contexto de la disputa legal entre Anthropic y el Pentágono. La IA ya cumple roles autónomos en operaciones reales.
bajada_en: MIT Tech Review examines why 'humans in the loop' in AI-powered conflicts is an illusion, amid the Anthropic-Pentagon legal dispute. AI already performs autonomous roles in real operations.

title: Training and Finetuning Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
title_es: Hugging Face: entrenar modelos multimodales con Sentence Transformers
bajada: Hugging Face publicó una guía para entrenar y ajustar modelos de embedding y rerankers multimodales usando Sentence Transformers. Este recurso ayuda a developers a crear representaciones vectoriales más sofisticadas para búsqueda y ranking.
bajada_en: Hugging Face published a guide for training and fine-tuning multimodal embedding and reranker models using Sentence Transformers. This resource helps developers create more sophisticated vector representations for search and ranking.

title: Anthropic Plots Major London Expansion
summary: As tensions with the US government mount, Anthropic has leased a new office with enough space to quadruple its 200-person headcount in London.
title_es: Anthropic planea expansión masiva en Londres con nueva oficina
bajada: Anthropic arrendó una nueva oficina en Londres con capacidad para cuadruplicar su equipo de 200 personas. El movimiento se produce mientras aumentan tensiones entre la empresa y el gobierno estadounidense.
bajada_en: Anthropic leased a new London office with capacity to quadruple its 200-person team. The move comes as tensions rise between the company and the US government.

title: This simulation startup wants to be the Cursor for physical AI
summary: Antioch raised a $8.5 million seed round to create simulation tools for a new generation of robot builders.
title_es: Antioch recauda $8.5M para crear herramientas de simulación para robots
bajada: Antioch, una startup de simulación, levantó $8.5 millones en su ronda seed para desarrollar herramientas enfocadas en física de IA. La compañía se posiciona como el equivalente a Cursor pero para construcción de robots.
bajada_en: Antioch, a simulation startup, raised $8.5 million in seed funding to develop tools for physical AI. The company positions itself as the Cursor equivalent for robot builders.

title: Google launches a Gemini AI app on Mac
summary: Google is launching a new Gemini app on Mac that allows you to interact with the AI assistant without switching windows on your desktop. With the app, you can use the Option + Space shortcut to pull up a floating chat bubble, where you can ask Gemini questions and share your window. Before sharing your […]
title_es: Google lanza aplicación Gemini para macOS con acceso rápido
bajada: Google lanzó una app nativa de Gemini para Mac que permite acceder al asistente sin cambiar ventanas. Con el atajo Option + Space, usuarios pueden abrir una burbuja de chat flotante para consultas.
bajada_en: Google launched a native Gemini app for Mac enabling quick access to the AI assistant without switching windows. The Option + Space shortcut opens a floating chat bubble for queries.

title: Inside VAKRA: Reasoning, Tool Use, and Failure Modes of Agents
title_es: IBM Research: análisis de VAKRA sobre agentes de IA
bajada: Hugging Face publicó un análisis de VAKRA, un benchmark que examina el razonamiento, uso de herramientas y modos de fallo en agentes de IA. El estudio proporciona insights valiosos para developers que construyen sistemas de agentes.
bajada_en: Hugging Face published an analysis of VAKRA, a benchmark examining reasoning, tool use, and failure modes in AI agents. The study provides valuable insights for developers building agent systems.

title: Making AI operational in constrained public sector environments
summary: The AI boom has hit across industries, and public sector organizations are facing pressure to accelerate adoption. At the same time, government institutions face distinct constraints around security, governance, and operations that set them apart from their business counterparts. For this reason, purpose-built small language models (SLMs) offer a promising path to operationalize AI in…
title_es: SLMs: modelos de lenguaje pequeños para el sector público
bajada: MIT Tech Review analiza cómo los Small Language Models (SLMs) ofrecen un camino viable para operacionalizar IA en entidades públicas con restricciones de seguridad y gobernanza. Los SLMs abordan desafíos únicos del sector público.
bajada_en: MIT Tech Review explores how Small Language Models (SLMs) offer a viable path to operationalize AI in public sector entities with security and governance constraints. SLMs address unique public sector challenges.
